ignoreCommand: cd .. && git fetch --depth=1 origin $VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA 2>/dev/null; if git cat-file -e ${VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA}^{commit} 2>/dev/null && git cat-file -e ${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA}^{commit} 2>/dev/null; then git diff --quiet $VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA $VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA -- webapp/ packages/shared/ pnpm-lock.yaml; else exit 1; fi
